mentions.note: Cristiano Amon participating in Computex; stable positioning amid semiconductor cycle.

Led data center rally surge despite not being pure data center play; core business is cell phones (structural decline per Arm Holdings); rode momentum wave in rally; part of correction/pullback now underway.
Up 15% on landing big hyperscaler account; rebrand away from cell phone to data center play; now in favor.
Cramer says no, don't buy; making series of missteps; prefers ARM which is making good steps.
